configurations.name: backend
runtimeArgs: cd backend && DATA_MODE=memory CORS_ORIGINS=http://localhost:12175,http://127.0.0.1:12175 PYTHONPATH=$(cd .. && pwd):${PYTHONPATH:-} .venv/bin/uvicorn src.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 9002

configurations.name: frontend
runtimeArgs: cd frontend && VITE_DATA_MODE=memory VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:9002 npm run dev -- --port 12175
